content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian's spatial path changes were fused into two, and then fused, and finally the two changes were integrated.

At this point, the prototype of the Space Pole Dao was completely condensed into the Space Pole Dao.

In an instant, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao body changed again, merging with the power of the Spatial Extreme Dao.

Soon, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Body transformed, and his strength improved again.

"The Extreme Dao of the Sword, the Extreme Dao of Space, if I comprehend the Extreme Dao of Time in the future, I will also be able to step into the realm of the Perfect Controller with the Extreme Dao of Time and Space for the next time. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And after comprehending the Spatial Pole Dao, Ye Tian could advance a distance in the Extreme Dao Mountain.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian continued to move forward, and after walking a distance, he stopped.

"The effect of meditation here is better, so let's practice here!"

Ye Tian decided.

In the following days, Ye Tian was here to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao of Time.

And at this time, Ye Tian's will clone began to condense the Space Pole Dao Coin, in terms of value and purchasing power, the Space Pole Dao Token was better.

More than two million eternal years have passed.

On the Extreme Dao Mountain, golden light was shining, radiating the entire space-time ancestral realm.

At this moment, the eyes of all the strong people were attracted by Jidao Mountain.

"What happened to Jidao Mountain, what kind of light is that, it's too dazzling. "

"That's a sign of the opening of the Extreme Dao List!"

"In 100 million eternal years, the Extreme Dao List has only been opened once, and many perfect controllers deliberately wait for the Extreme Dao List to open in order to be able to enter the Extreme Dao List, so as not to run out of time and be unable to enter the space-time ancestral realm again, then there is no way to enter the Extreme Dao List again. "

"Yes, many perfect controllers can't enter the Extreme Dao List at one time, so they wait for the next time, wait and wait, spread the time, countless billions of eternal years, and still stay in the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space, just to enter the Extreme Dao List once. Once you enter the Extreme Dao List, you can increase your cultivation time in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm!"

"Entering the Extreme Dao List, can I increase my cultivation time in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm?"

"Yes, there are a total of 100 positions on the Extreme Dao List, only the cultivators who are still in the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space for the time being are recorded, not counting the strength and cultivation, only the Extreme Dao of Enlightenment is recorded, and only those who comprehend the Extreme Dao are eligible to enter the Extreme Dao List. Of course, if you only comprehend one kind of extreme path, you are not qualified to enter the extreme path list at all. Those who are super-perfect masters, which super-perfect masters have not comprehended the Extreme Path? At the very least, they must comprehend two Extreme Paths in order to be eligible to be on the Extreme Path List. "

"Fortunately, the Immortal Realm Perfect Controllers above the Super Perfect Masters can't enter the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, otherwise the Extreme Dao List will definitely be occupied by them. "

......

"The Extreme Dao List has opened, but unfortunately I still haven't comprehended an Extreme Dao!"

The Moonglass Controller muttered.

However, this is also normal, she has only created a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and at the level of a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, how terrifying is it to comprehend the Extreme Dao!

Mt. Gokumi.

Ye Tian looked at the golden light above the Extreme Dao Mountain, which was constantly converging and turning into a list.

"Extreme list, I don't know if I can go up. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he enters the Extreme Dao List, he will be able to stay in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm for a long time.

However, with so many cultivators in the entire space-time ancestral realm, only a hundred people could enter the Extreme Dao List, and it was so difficult to enter the Extreme Dao List.

For example, some super-perfect masters may only master one kind of extreme path, but the realm of other people's extreme path is high.

Ye Tian only condensed the Sword Extreme Dao and the Space Extreme Dao, but did not continue to deeply comprehend these two Extreme Dao, in fact, these two Extreme Dao could continue to improve, but it was too much of a waste of time.

And the Extreme Dao list will exist for millions of eternal years, during this period, maintain the ranking of the list, and finally get rewards, if you are kicked down by other strong people halfway, there will be no rewards.

Time passed slowly, and soon the Extreme Dao List was condensed.

Rumble!!!!

A picture scroll of the list seemed to envelop many time and space in the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space, and the power of the Extreme Dao seeped out from the Extreme Dao List.

Soon, the list began to be announced on the Pole List.

It can be said that the powerhouses who can be ranked on the list of the Extreme Path are almost all super-perfect controllers, after all, they have comprehended at least two kinds of Extreme Paths, and almost all of them are already super-perfect controllers.

However, when the sixty-third place on the Pole List was announced, countless people were shocked.

Sixty-third place on the Extreme Dao List: Ye Tian, the Endless Controller, the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, comprehended the Extreme Dao of the Sword, the Extreme Dao of Space, and the Extreme Dao of Time, so he was ranked on the Extreme Dao List

When this list was announced, countless people in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm were shocked.

It can be said that at this moment, Ye Tian is really famous in many eternal worlds, not only in the ruins of eternity.

"Oh my God, a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm has actually comprehended the Extreme Dao of Space, the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and also comprehended the prototype of the Extreme Dao of Time. "

"This person has the potential to become the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and it takes infinite eternity to give birth to such a demon!"

"Hey, being able to comprehend an extreme path at the level of a half-step perfect controller in the Extreme Realm will have a great hope of becoming a perfect controller of the Void Realm in the future, and there is even hope to become a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm and comprehend several extreme paths, I can't imagine it!"

"Ye Tian's talent is terrifying, if only I had one-tenth of his talent!"

......

In the Ancestral City of Time and Space.

The moon glass controller also opened his mouth wide, with a look of surprise.

"Ye Tian, he actually comprehended two kinds of extreme paths, and there is also a rudimentary form of the extreme path, if he comprehends the time extreme path again, it will be three extreme paths! "

Although she didn't know much about Ye Tian, she also knew that Ye Tian had been a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm for far less than her!

She had always been very confident in her talent, believing that she was the most talented person in the Wudao Tower, but at this moment, she was stimulated.

"No wonder Ye Tian doesn't have any background, but he has obtained the Space-Time Ancestral Order given by the Old Ancestor, it turns out that his talent is so terrifying!" muttered the Moon Glass Controller.

The Ruins of Eternity.

A silent space.

Two figures emerged.

One is the Ancient Lord of the Boundless Tower, and the other is the Boundless Lord of the Boundless Chamber of Commerce.

"Canggu, your Daoless Tower is very deeply hidden, and such a demonic genius was born!" said the Boundless Lord with a smile.

"Oh, what a demonic genius?"

Canggu was still pretending not to know, but he knew very well in his heart that the Lord of Boundlessness should be talking about Ye Tian.

"Canggu, you are still hiding it from me, Ye Tian of your Daoless Tower has entered the Extreme Dao List of the Ancestor Realm of Time and Space, ranking sixty-third on the Extreme Dao List. The Boundless Lord said.

"What, Ye Tian has entered the Extreme Dao List?"

The Lord of the Ancient was shocked, he really didn't know about it.
